commands.name: GenerateEntities
commands.description:
Generate a file (see --Output) with all entities
extracted from tables and view of specified database.

options.name: --ConnectionString
options.description:
Connection string to the database server.
See https://www.connectionstrings.com

options.name: --Attribute
options.description:
Include the Column attribute if necessary.
If value is empty, the Apps72 Column attribute is added.
You can set the full qualified name of attribute to add
in addition of Apps72.
Ex: -a="System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations.Schema.Column"

options.name: --ClassFormat
options.description: Format of class: NameOnly or SchemaAndName.

options.name: --CodeAnalysis
options.description:
Exception codes to add in top of file to avoid Code Analysis
warning. Code separator is ','. Ex: AV1706, AV1507).

options.name: --Language
options.description: Target format: CSharp (only this one at this moment).

options.name: --Namespace
options.description: Name of the namespace to generate.

options.name: --NullableRefTypes
options.description:
Use the C# 8.0 nullable reference types.
See https://docs.microsoft.com/dotnet/csharp/nullable-references

options.name: --Output
options.description: File name where class will be written.

options.name: --OnlySchema
options.description: Only for the specified schema.

options.name: --Provider
options.description: Type of server: SqlServer, Oracle or SqLite.

options.name: --SortProperties
options.description: Sort generated properties alphabetically.

options.name: --Validations
options.description:
Include DataAnnotations attributes [StringLength], [Range] and Validate() method.
Ex. --Validations=Range;StringLength;ValidateMethod
By default, Provider=SqlServer, Output=Entities.cs, Language=CSharp
Namespace=[Empty], ClassFormat=NameOnly

commands.name: Merge
commands.description: Merge all script files to a single global file.

options.name: --Source
options.description:
Source directory pattern containing all files to merged.
Default is "*.sql" in current directory.

options.name: --Output
options.description:
File name where all files will be merged.
If not set, the merged file will be written to the console.

options.name: --Separator
options.description:
Add this separator between each merged files.
Ex: -sp=GO

commands.name: Run
commands.description: Run all script files into the database specified by --ConnectionString.

options.name: --ConnectionString
options.description:
Connection string to the database server.
See https://www.connectionstrings.com

options.name: --Source
options.description:
Source directory pattern containing all files to merged.
Default is "*.sql" in current directory.

options.name: --Separator
options.description:
Split script using this separator, to execute part of script
and not a global script. Set -sp=GO for SQL Server.

options.name: --Provider
options.description: Type of server: SqlServer, Oracle or SqLite.

options.name: --DbConfigAfter
--DbConfigUpdate
options.description:
Query to update the last file executed.
The variable @Filename will be replace with the SQL file name (without extension).
Ex: -cu="UPDATE [Configuration] SET [Value] = @Filename WHERE [Key] = 'DbVer'"
